overview: A Live AI News Hub that automatically generates and displays structured daily news updates in Hindi + Hinglish. Covers Gold Rates, Weather, Breaking News, Future Trends, and Entertainment — all powered by AI, presented in a slick dark-themed website with a continuous scrolling ticker.
features: AI-generated news content in Hindi + Hinglish mix
5 sections: Gold Rate, Weather, Breaking News, Future Trends, Entertainment
Auto-refresh every 10 seconds (frontend) and 10 minutes (backend AI fetch)
Caching layer to avoid excessive AI API calls
